_comment: Semantic color tokens for AMDG. Palette: 'Slate Navy & Cyan'. Hand-authored (the UTulsa palette was intentionally dropped). All text pairings below meet WCAG 2.1 AA. To regenerate/seed from another site's CSS, run `npm run theme -- <url>` (see scripts/extract-theme.mjs), but this file is the committed source of truth.
name: Slate Navy & Cyan
